NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL DEFT'S INTERROGATRORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND FOR AN ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR MONETARYS ANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SENIOR, MARTIN GAEHWILER TRUSTEE OF THE GAEHWILER 2000 TRUST AND MARTIN GAEHWILER JUNIOR HEARING SET FOR DEC-22-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-22-2009 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS MODIFIED. PLAINTIFF MARTIN SENIOR'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS' RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; AND FOR ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS SHALL ISSUE IN THE SUM OF $290.00, PAYABLE WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. SEE MINUTES FOR DETAILS. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft'S Interrogatrories And Request For Production Of Documents, And For An Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetarys Anctions
Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Weldon E. Bradstreet, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Martin Gaehwiler Senior
Enrique Mota, defendant and opposing party in Propria Persona
Elsy Hernandez, Spanish Interpreter, for defendant

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
Plaintiff Martin Senior's Motion To Compel Defendants' Responses To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents; And For Order Establishing Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions. There being no opposition, motion is granted:
1. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
2. Defendant shall serve full, complete and verified response to plaintiff's form interrogatories (set one); special interrogatories (set one); and request for production of documents (set one), within 14 days of notice of entry of this order;
3. If verified responses to Plaintiff's request for admission are not served within 14 days, the matter set forth in plaintiffs' request for admissions will be deemed admitted;
4. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
